initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['execute_locally']
Prompt family: execute
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Implement a complete, efficient, and correct solution for the problem. 

After your internal reasoning, you must output exactly one JSON object. 

CRITICAL FORMATTING RULE: The 'response' field must be a single, raw string. It must NOT be a JSON object. It must NOT contain markdown code fences. It must contain exactly two lines separated by a single '\n'.

Example of a valid 'response' string value:
FINAL_ANSWER: [your code here]
JUSTIFICATION: [your justification here]

Return the result in this exact JSON structure:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "short note",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <code_here>\nJUSTIFICATION: <justification_here>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B1-usaco-2024-us-open-platinum-identity-theft
Title: B1. USACO 2024 US Open Platinum / Identity Theft

Problem:
Extend cows' bitstring IDs so no cow can be mistaken for another when some reported IDs are truncated.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
